commands.review_summary:
The PR changes plugin install/update, doctor repair, onboarding, and legacy state migration paths so official npm plugin records store exact resolved specs and equivalent legacy records do not warn.

PR surface: Source +141, Tests +254. Total +395 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: PR head passes `syncOfficialPluginInstalls: true` from the manual update command, and `updateNpmInstalledPlugins` uses the official override before the stored record spec. I did not run a live patched update/status flow.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs a contributor proof update plus a maintainer-reviewed exact-pin compatibility fix before merge; the missing real behavior proof keeps this out of the automated repair lane.

target.title: Pin official npm plugin install records
target.body:
## Summary

- Persist exact npm registry `resolvedSpec` values into managed official plugin install records instead of rewriting them back to bare catalog specs after successful installs/updates.
- Keep third-party moving npm specs unchanged so the trust audit still warns on user-authored unpinned records.
- Let `openclaw plugins update` resolve official plugins through the official catalog, so exact-pinned official records can still update.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `openclaw update` can rewrite official npm plugin records such as `acpx`, `codex`, and `discord` back to bare specs like `@openclaw/codex`, causing `openclaw status --deep` to report `WARN Plugin index includes unpinned npm specs` even though the installed npm payload and lockfile are versioned.

Real environment tested: Local PR worktree on macOS with Node v25.8.1 and pnpm 11.2.2. The before-fix behavior proof screenshot was captured from the reporter's local OpenClaw environment: [PR-behaviour-proof.png](https://github.com/zhuisDEV/OpenClaw/releases/download/pr-88585-proof/PR-behaviour-proof.png).

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/installs.test.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts`; `pnpm format:check src/plugins/installs.ts src/plugins/installs.test.ts src/plugins/update.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts src/cli/plugins-update-command.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/plugins/installs.ts src/plugins/installs.test.ts src/plugins/update.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts src/cli/plugins-update-command.ts`; `git diff --check`.

Evidence after fix: Tests now assert that trusted official npm update/doctor paths persist exact specs such as `@openclaw/acpx@2026.5.2-beta.2`, `@openclaw/codex@2026.5.2`, and `@openclaw/discord@2026.5.16-beta.5`, while a third-party moving spec remains unpinned.

Observed result after fix: Managed official plugin records keep the installed artifact identity in `record.spec`, so the existing audit no longer sees official update-generated records as unpinned npm specs; non-managed moving specs continue to warn.

What was not tested: I did not run a live patched `openclaw update` against the reporter's `~/.openclaw` state. The proof image is before-fix evidence of the user-visible warning this patch targets.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/installs.test.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts`
- `pnpm format:check src/plugins/installs.ts src/plugins/installs.test.ts src/plugins/update.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts src/cli/plugins-update-command.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/plugins/installs.ts src/plugins/installs.test.ts src/plugins/update.ts src/plugins/update.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/missing-configured-plugin-install.test.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.ts src/commands/onboarding-plugin-install.test.ts src/cli/plugins-update-command.ts`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: zhuisdev
